settings.heading: Your Setup Deserves Glass.
settings.subheading: Tempered glass mousepads with artwork sealed underneath. Smoother than cloth. Cleaner than plastic. Built to outlast them both.

settings.label: Easy Clean
settings.support_text: Wipe it down in seconds. No stains, no odor.

settings.label: Built to Last
settings.support_text: Scratch-resistant tempered glass, not fraying fabric.

settings.label: Premium Aesthetic
settings.support_text: A desk setup upgrade you can actually see.

settings.heading: Cloth Pads Were Never Built to Last.
settings.body: Fraying edges. Grime soaked into the fabric. That dead, sticky drag after a few months of use. Cloth mousepads look fine on day one — and it's downhill from there. You clean the rest of your desk. Why not your mousepad?

settings.heading: Glass Doesn't Wear Down. It Just Works.
settings.body: Tempered glass never frays, never stains, never slows down. It's the same smooth glide on day 1,000 as it was on day one — with a look that actually belongs on a premium desk setup.

settings.heading: See the Difference for Yourself.
settings.subheading: Same desk. Same mouse. A completely different experience.

settings.heading: Find Your Glass.
settings.subheading: Every design is sealed beneath 4mm tempered glass — sizes for every desk, every setup.

settings.heading: Engineered Like a Setup Upgrade Should Be.

settings.title: Sealed Under-Glass Art

settings.title: Effortless Clean

settings.heading: Limited Art. Sealed in Glass.
settings.body: Every drop features original artwork from independent artists — once it's gone, it's gone. New designs, released in limited runs.

settings.heading: Make It Yours.
settings.body: Upload your own design and we'll seal it under 4mm tempered glass. Photos, patterns, logos, original art — if you can create it, we'll make it a glass pad.

settings.heading: Upgrade Your Desk. For Good.
settings.body: Join thousands who've made the switch to glass. Free shipping on every order, and a 30-day glide guarantee.

settings.question: Is tempered glass durable?
settings.answer: Yes. Each pad uses 4mm shatter-resistant tempered glass, the same category of glass used in smartphone screen protectors and cooktops — built to handle daily desk use without scratching or cracking under normal conditions.

settings.question: How do I clean it?
settings.answer: Wipe with a damp microfiber cloth or standard glass cleaner. No washing, no drying time, no buildup — spills and dust lift off in seconds.

settings.question: Does it affect mouse glide or sensor tracking?
settings.answer: No — the surface is micro-etched for smooth, consistent glide and is fully compatible with optical and laser mouse sensors.

settings.question: Is it noisy compared to cloth?
settings.answer: No, it's actually quieter. The smooth glass surface produces less friction noise than textured cloth.

settings.question: Will the artwork fade or peel?
settings.answer: Never. Artwork is sealed directly beneath the glass surface, fully protected from UV fading, scratching, or rubbing off over time.

settings.question: What sizes are available?
settings.answer: Glass Pads come in Standard (mouse-only) and XL Desk (full keyboard + mouse coverage) sizes — see each product page for exact dimensions.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Orders ship within 1-2 business days. Delivery timelines vary by location — full details on our Shipping page.

settings.tagline: Premium tempered glass mousepads. Built to outlast everything else on your desk.
